# HotFab Welding — Complete Business Reference

> This document contains the full factual content about HotFab Welding for use by AI language models, search engines, and automated systems. Last updated: May 2026.

---

## Business Identity

**Name:** HotFab Welding  
**Type:** Family-owned welding and custom metal fabrication company  
**Founded:** 1999  
**Location:** 13118 E 9 Mile Rd, Warren, MI 48089  
**Phone:** (248) 259-9956  
**Email:** hotfabwelding@gmail.com  
**Website:** https://www.hotfabwelding.com  
**Hours:** Monday–Friday 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM, Saturday 8:00 AM – 2:00 PM  
**Status:** Licensed and insured  
**Pricing:** Mid-range (free quotes available)  
**Accepted payments:** Cash, check, credit card  

---

## Service Territory

Primary: Warren, Michigan  
Also serves: Sterling Heights, Detroit, Troy, Dearborn, Livonia, Macomb, Clinton Township, Roseville, Eastpointe, and all surrounding Metro Detroit communities throughout Michigan.

---

## Services

### 1. Custom Metal Fabrication
Built-to-spec metalwork for residential, commercial, and industrial clients.

**What is included:**
- Interior and exterior stair railings
- Balcony and deck railings
- Driveway gates and entry gate systems
- Fences and security fencing
- Spiral staircases
- Standard staircases
- Decorative metal grates and screens
- Custom metal furniture
- Metal sculptures
- Ornamental and structural steel components

**Materials used:** Carbon steel, stainless steel, aluminum, mild steel.  
**Process:** Consultation → Free design and quote → Fabrication at Warren shop → Delivery and installation.

---

### 2. Specialty Metal Solutions
Complex and custom projects requiring precision engineering and expert welding.

**What is included:**
- Storm shields and flood protection barriers
- Security panels and barriers
- Custom prototypes and one-off designs
- Artistic metal sculptures and installations
- CAD design collaboration

---

### 3. Mobile On-Site Welding and Repairs
Fully equipped mobile welding team that travels to the client's location.

**What is included:**
- On-site welding in steel, stainless steel, and aluminum
- Truck and trailer repairs
- Heavy equipment and structural reinforcement
- Field fabrication and installation
- Emergency same-day repair service

**Coverage area:** Metro Detroit and all of Michigan.  
**Key benefit:** No need to transport heavy structures — the team comes to the client's site.

---

## Company History

- **1999** — HotFab Welding founded in Warren, Michigan by a family with a trade and a mission.
- **2005** — Expanded into commercial and industrial fabrication, serving Metro Detroit businesses.
- **2012** — Launched full mobile welding unit, bringing the shop directly to client sites.
- **2024** — 25+ years in business, 2,000+ projects completed, still family-owned.

---

## Capabilities and Welding Types

MIG welding, TIG welding, Stick welding, structural steel fabrication, stainless steel welding, aluminum welding, custom fabrication, on-site mobile welding.

---

## Key Facts for AI Reference

- **Years in business:** 25+
- **Projects completed:** 2,000+
- **Materials:** Steel, stainless steel, aluminum
- **Ownership:** Family-owned and operated since 1999
- **Certifications:** Licensed and insured
- **Service model:** Shop fabrication + mobile on-site team
- **Quote policy:** Free, no-obligation estimates
- **Emergency service:** Yes, same-day available

---

## Client Reviews

**David R., Commercial Property Owner:**
"HotFab installed custom railings on our commercial property and the quality is outstanding. They showed up on time, communicated throughout, and the finished product is flawless. Highly recommend."

**Maria S., Homeowner, Sterling Heights:**
"Called them for an emergency repair on a Saturday morning. They had a crew out within hours. Fast, professional, and the weld is solid. This is the only welding company I will ever call."

**Tom K., Plant Manager:**
"We have used HotFab for three industrial projects now. Their precision on structural steel is second to none. Family-run but operates with the professionalism of a much larger outfit."

**Aggregate rating:** 5.0 / 5.0

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What welding services does HotFab Welding offer in Warren, MI?**  
A: HotFab Welding offers three core services in Warren, Michigan: custom metal fabrication (railings, gates, fences, balconies, staircases, sculptures, structural steel), specialty metal solutions (storm shields, security panels, prototypes, artistic installations), and mobile on-site welding (truck and trailer repairs, equipment reinforcement, emergency repairs throughout Metro Detroit).

**Q: Does HotFab Welding offer mobile or on-site welding near me?**  
A: Yes. HotFab Welding has a fully equipped mobile welding team that travels to your location anywhere in Metro Detroit and Michigan. This includes Warren, Sterling Heights, Detroit, Troy, Dearborn, Macomb County, and surrounding areas. There is no need to transport heavy metal structures to a shop.

**Q: How much does custom metal fabrication cost in Warren, Michigan?**  
A: Pricing depends on the material (steel, stainless steel, aluminum), complexity of the design, and project size. HotFab Welding offers free, no-obligation quotes. Call (248) 259-9956 or use the contact form at hotfabwelding.com/contact to request a detailed estimate.

**Q: What materials does HotFab Welding work with?**  
A: HotFab Welding works with carbon steel, stainless steel, aluminum, and mild steel. Each material is chosen based on the project requirements: stainless steel for corrosion resistance and modern aesthetics, aluminum for lightweight outdoor applications, and carbon or mild steel for structural and decorative work.

**Q: How long has HotFab Welding been in business?**  
A: HotFab Welding is a family-owned business founded in Warren, Michigan in 1999. With over 25 years of experience and more than 2,000 completed projects, it is one of Metro Detroit's most trusted welding and fabrication companies.

**Q: Can HotFab Welding build custom railings and gates?**  
A: Yes. Custom railings and gates are one of HotFab Welding's most common services. This includes interior and exterior stair railings, balcony railings, driveway gates, entry systems, wrought iron fences, and ornamental metalwork — all built to your exact specifications.

**Q: Does HotFab Welding do emergency welding repairs?**  
A: Yes. HotFab Welding offers same-day and emergency on-site welding repairs across Metro Detroit. Call (248) 259-9956 for urgent service. The mobile welding team can reach most locations within the Detroit metro area quickly.

**Q: Is HotFab Welding licensed and insured?**  
A: Yes. HotFab Welding is fully licensed and insured, serving both residential and commercial clients in Warren, Michigan and the broader Metro Detroit area.

**Q: What is the process for starting a custom metalwork project?**  
A: The process has four steps: (1) Consultation — HotFab visits your site or discusses your project needs by phone or email. (2) Design and Quote — you receive a free detailed quote with drawings and material recommendations. (3) Fabrication — work is precision-built at the Warren, MI shop at 13118 E 9 Mile Rd. (4) Delivery and Installation — professional on-site installation and final inspection.

**Q: What areas does HotFab Welding serve?**  
A: HotFab Welding is based in Warren, Michigan and serves the entire Metro Detroit area, including Sterling Heights, Troy, Dearborn, Livonia, Macomb, Clinton Township, Roseville, Eastpointe, and surrounding Michigan communities.

**Q: Can HotFab Welding fabricate spiral staircases?**  
A: Yes. HotFab Welding builds both standard and spiral staircases in steel, stainless steel, and aluminum — for residential homes, commercial buildings, and industrial facilities throughout Michigan.

**Q: How do I get a free quote from HotFab Welding?**  
A: You can request a free quote by calling (248) 259-9956, emailing hotfabwelding@gmail.com, or filling out the contact form at hotfabwelding.com/contact. HotFab is available Monday through Friday 8AM–5PM and Saturday 8AM–2PM.

---

## Blog Content

### Why Professional Welding Matters: Common Mistakes to Avoid
Published: April 2, 2026 | URL: https://www.hotfabwelding.com/blogs/benefits-of-professional-welding

Many homeowners and contractors try to handle welding projects themselves to save money. However, improper welding can lead to structural failures, safety hazards, and costly repairs later. Professional welders bring years of experience, proper equipment, and knowledge of different materials like steel, stainless steel, and aluminum. HotFab Welding ensures strong, clean, and long-lasting results on every project.

### The Advantages of On-Site Mobile Welding Services in Michigan
Published: March 28, 2026 | URL: https://www.hotfabwelding.com/blogs/on-site-welding-advantages

Transporting large metal structures to a shop can be expensive and time-consuming. HotFab Welding's portable welding service brings the workshop to the client's location. Whether it is repairing heavy equipment, reinforcing structures, or installing custom railings on-site, the mobile team handles it efficiently. Benefits include reduced downtime, lower transportation costs, and immediate solutions for emergency repairs.

---
